underlying_goal: Pick up a Linear ticket (INT-222) to hide a UI button when there are no relevant sources, implement the fix, and ship a PR
friction_detail: Claude initially hid the wrong button (InterpretConversationSheet instead of FilesSheet), then used wrong logical operator, requiring multiple user corrections.
brief_summary: User wanted to implement a ticket to hide the FilesSheet button when no sources exist; Claude initially targeted the wrong button and needed iterative correction but eventually shipped the fix.
